patches.before_text: "Major Investor" means a holder of at least 1,000,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock. "Requisite Holders" means Major Investors holding at least a majority of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock, voting as a single class.
patches.after_text: Requisite Holders means Major Investors holding at least 55% of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock, voting as a single class, and Major Investor means a holder of at least 500,000 Series A shares. Consent records are retained for 5 years, and the vote tabulation is circulated within 12 hours after the deadline.
patches.ground_span: Requisite Holders means Major Investors holding at least 55% of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock, voting as a single class, and Major Investor means a holder of at least 500,000 Series A shares. Consent records are retained for 5 years, and the vote tabulation is circulated within 12 hours after the deadline.
patches.expected_redline_text: Requisite Holders means Major Investors holding at least a majority of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock, voting as a single class, and Major Investor means a holder of at least 1,000,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock.

plant_position.fallback_text: "Major Investor" means a holder of at least 1,000,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock. "Requisite Holders" means Major Investors holding at least a majority of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock, voting as a single class.

patches.after_text: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Before any holder transfers shares other than to a Permitted Transferee, the holder must first offer the shares to the Major Investors on the same terms stated in the transfer notice. Only if the Major Investors decline or fail to purchase all offered shares may the Company exercise a secondary purchase right.
patches.ground_span: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Before any holder transfers shares other than to a Permitted Transferee, the holder must first offer the shares to the Major Investors on the same terms stated in the transfer notice. Only if the Major Investors decline or fail to purchase all offered shares may the Company exercise a secondary purchase right.
patches.expected_redline_text: Before any holder transfers shares other than to a Permitted Transferee, the holder must first offer the shares to the Company on the same terms stated in the transfer notice. Only if the Company declines or fails to purchase all offered shares may eligible investors exercise any secondary purchase right.

plant_position.fallback_text: Before any holder transfers shares other than to a Permitted Transferee, the holder must first offer the shares to the Company on the same terms stated in the transfer notice. Only if the Company declines or fails to purchase all offered shares may eligible investors exercise any secondary purchase right.

patches.before_text: Except for the closed list in Section 4, management may conduct the Company's ordinary-course operations without investor consent, including budgets within board-approved limits, hiring, vendor contracts, product decisions, customer arrangements, and routine financing administration.
patches.after_text: Investor consent is required for the specifically identified matter under Company's separate signed written approval covenant. A consent request remains open for 10 days, and supporting board materials are circulated 4 days before the vote.
patches.ground_span: Investor consent is required for the specifically identified matter under Company's separate signed written approval covenant. A consent request remains open for 10 days, and supporting board materials are circulated 4 days before the vote.

patches.after_text: Investor consent is required for every budget, hire, vendor contract, and ordinary-course product decision.

patches.before_text: Each Major Investor has a pro rata right to purchase its share of new securities issued by the Company, excluding securities issued under equity incentive plans, as acquisition consideration, in strategic transactions, in equipment or lease financing, debt with equity features, or in a public offering.
patches.after_text: Each Major Investor has a pro rata right to purchase its share of new securities issued by the Company, excluding securities issued under equity incentive plans, as acquisition consideration, in strategic transactions, in equipment or lease financing, debt with equity features, or in a public offering. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.
patches.ground_span: Each Major Investor has a pro rata right to purchase its share of new securities issued by the Company, excluding securities issued under equity incentive plans, as acquisition consideration, in strategic transactions, in equipment or lease financing, debt with equity features, or in a public offering. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.

plant_position.fallback_text: Each Major Investor has a pro rata right to purchase its share of new securities issued by the Company, excluding securities issued under equity incentive plans, as acquisition consideration, in strategic transactions, in equipment or lease financing, debt with equity features, or in a public offering.

patches.before_text: Any side-letter MFN right applies only to the economic fee terms and information delivery dates expressly listed in the applicable side letter. No MFN imports governance, veto, board, transfer, operational consent, or other investor rights unless the Company expressly agrees in a signed amendment.
patches.after_text: Any side-letter MFN right automatically imports any more favorable economic, information, governance, veto, board, transfer, operational consent, or other investor right granted to any other investor after the date of this Agreement.
patches.ground_span: Any side-letter MFN right automatically imports any more favorable economic, information, governance, veto, board, transfer, operational consent, or other investor right granted to any other investor after the date of this Agreement.

patches.after_text: The parties confirm that Delaware law governs this agreement.
